opinions.title: Linux is the best OS for developers!
opinions.body:
Once you switch to Linux you never go back.

The terminal alone is worth it.

opinions.title: React + Node.js is the perfect stack
opinions.body:
Full-stack JavaScript is powerful.

One language for everything — frontend and backend.

opinions.title: Self-taught developers can compete!
opinions.body:
You don't need a degree to become a great developer.

Udemy + practice + GitHub = job ready.
